creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 196868
Port Update

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump, maintainer handoff
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: file drift

Notable changes from 2.3.0.4 to 2.5.0.0:
    skalibs dependency bumped to 2.7.0.0
    import has been removed, and the corresponding conflict with imagemagick.

As always, update notes can be found at:
https://www.skarnet.org/software/execline/upgrade.html
